key_provisions.heading: SPECIAL CONTROL AREA PROVISIONS FOR SMALL INFILL DEVELOPMENT
PURPOSE
key_provisions.summary: The purpose of this policy is to complement the planning controls set out in Local Planning

key_provisions.heading: APPLICATION
key_provisions.summary: This policy applies to areas designated on the scheme map of LPS4 as Special Control

key_provisions.heading: STATUTORY BACKGROUND
key_provisions.summary: Clause 5.7 in LPS4 sets out the requirements for development under this policy.
